name: Crusty Rye Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a deep bowl, measure out the rye flour. Make a well in the center.
2. Dissolve the yeast in the warm water and add to the bowl. Add salt, oil, and vinegar. Stir vigorously.
3. Gradually add the white flour to the mixture. Knead well until the dough is pliable.
4. Form the dough into a round loaf and brush the surface with oil. Place in a 9-inch round pan.
5. Allow the dough to double in size.
6. Preheat the oven to 350°F and bake for 1 hour and 15 minutes.
